title: GSRTC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 4599 Driver Posts
description: The Gujarat State Road Transport Corporation (GSRTC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 4599 Driver Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 12th and ITI can apply for the GSRTC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee...
